TYPES.FPCLINE: TYPES: tt_final TYPE TABLE of ty_final.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: READ TABLE it_final INTO wa_final INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM adrc INTO ls_adrc_ag
SELECT SINGLE * FROM adrc INTO ls_adrc_we
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** CONCATENATE WA_MAT_TEXT wa_lines-tdline INTO WA_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY space.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** CONCATENATE WA_MAT_TEXT1 wa_lines-tdline INTO WA_MAT_TEXT1 SEPARATED BY space.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z110' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbap INTO wa_vbap
WHERE vbeln = wa_final-vbeln AND posnr = wa_final-posnr.
ls_adrc_ag-STR_SUPPL3 ls_adrc_ag-LOCATION INTO gv_adr SEPARATED BY SPACE.
ls_adrc_we-STR_SUPPL3 ls_adrc_we-LOCATION INTO gv_adr1 SEPARATED BY SPACE.
*IF WA_FINAL-KBETR4 is NOT INITIAL and WA_FINAL-erdat < '20250709'.
*ELSEif WA_FINAL-KBETR4 is NOT INITIAL and WA_FINAL-erdat ge '20250709'.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbak INTO gv_vbak
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbkd INTO gv_vbkd
lt_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** CONCATENATE GV_PO wa_lines-tdline INTO GV_PO SEPARATED BY space.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'ZZ99' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** CONCATENATE WA_MAT_TEXT wa_lines-tdline INTO WA_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY space.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z101' name = NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* CONCATENATE gv_1 gv_2 gv_3 gv_4 gv_5 gv_6 gv_7 gv_vtext INTO gv_vtext SEPARATED BY space.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z039' name = NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE gv_tpi_req lv_lines INTO gv_tpi_req SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z999' name = NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE gv_pack_d LV_LINES INTO gv_pack_d SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z012' name = NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE gv_part_d LV_LINES INTO gv_part_d SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z047' name = NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
IF WA_FINAL-AUART ne 'ZEXP' and WA_FINAL-AUART ne 'ZDEX'and WA_FINAL-JOIG IS INITIAL.
CONCATENATE lv_c1 lv_c2 INTO wa_tot-LV_head SEPARATED BY space .
IF WA_FINAL-JOIG is INITIAL and WA_FINAL-AUART ne 'ZEXP' and WA_FINAL-AUART ne 'ZDEX'.
CONCATENATE lv_c1 lv_c2 INTO wa_tot-LV_head SEPARATED BY space .
IF WA_FINAL-JOSG is INITIAL and WA_FINAL-JOCG is INITIAL and WA_FINAL-AUART ne 'ZEXP' and WA_FINAL-AUART ne 'ZDEX'.
CONCATENATE lv_c1 lv_c2 INTO wa_tot-LV_head SEPARATED BY space .
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM it_tot COMPARING LV_head.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE lv_text lv_lines INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z020' name = lv_textname object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
